scores.correctness_notes: Fully matches gold standard: containers/resources structure, type/description fields, resource name linking rule, and example all correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'Uploading an OCI image to Charmhub' section introduces charmcraft upload-resource details (--image flag, digest format, Canonical Registry behavior, resource revisions) not present in the gold standard.
